notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-295 — thanks for testing! THIS BUILD — (1) SPEED: search waits for you to stop typing before filtering, Radar counts and sorting do less work — the app should feel smoother, especially on a tablet; please tell me if search or sorting behaves ANY differently than before (it shouldn't — same numbers, same order). (2) SECURITY: password hashing strengthened 150k→600k rounds; your existing password upgrades silently on next login — if login ever fails with your correct password, tell me IMMEDIATELY. (3) NEW DEFAULT: fresh installs start with the 💧 Liquidity floor at ≥$50k/day (gold badge shows; Type tab → Any turns it off and sticks). Your existing setting is untouched. Feedback via ✉ top-left.
